overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a leather jacket walking through rainy London streets at night. The scene features wet pavement with fallen autumn leaves, illuminated street lamps, and large colorful murals on brick buildings. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet autumn street with billboard and brick walkway

agents.ego_description: character in leather jacket walking steadily through wet streets with weapon visible on back

tree with orange and yellow autumn foliage illuminated by street lamps
illuminated advertisement billboard with text and portrait
large sculptural letters X and R on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet asphalt street scattered with autumn leaves, passing an illuminated billboard. The scene transitions onto a brick walkway with an XR sculpture visible on the left, surrounded by trees with autumn foliage under street lamp lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with large illuminated mural building

events.description: approaching large illuminated mural covering entire building facade

agents.ego_description: character walking past the mural while looking up at the artwork

entered.detail: tall brick building covered with colorful illuminated mural depicting figures in red and gold

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and walks alongside a massive illuminated mural on a building facade. The artwork features colorful figures and patterns lit by spotlights. The ground transitions from asphalt to brick paving as the character moves past the mural.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark residential street with row houses

events.description: entering darker residential area with reduced street lighting
slight path adjustment to navigate around parked vehicle on sidewalk

entered.detail: row of historic brick townhouses with lit windows
silver car parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a darker residential street lined with brick row houses on both sides. Street lighting is sparse, creating deep shadows. The character navigates around a parked sedan while walking along the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with yellow grid markings and murals

events.description: approaching intersection with colorful graffiti-covered building and digital billboard

agents.ego_description: character crossing the intersection area while observing the surrounding murals

entered.detail: building covered in green and orange graffiti art with stylized lettering
road markings with yellow grid pattern indicating no parking zone
illuminated digital screen displaying advertisement on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wider intersection marked with yellow grid road markings. A prominent building covered in green graffiti art dominates the right side, while a digital billboard glows in the distance. The character crosses the intersection, passing under street lamps with the colorful building shifting from right to left in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked urban environment that shifts from illuminated commercial walkways to moody residential streets and finally into a wide, graffiti-laden intersection. It begins with the character walking along wet asphalt scattered with autumn leaves, passing an illuminated billboard before transitioning onto a brick walkway lined with foliage and an XR sculpture. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up to reveal a massive, spotlight-lit mural of colorful figures on a building facade, with the ground shifting from asphalt to brick paving. The camera then follows the character as they turn into a darker residential street of brick row houses, navigating through deep shadows and around a parked sedan. Finally, the environment expands into a wide intersection marked with yellow grid lines, where the character crosses under street lamps while a building covered in green graffiti and a distant digital billboard shift across the frame.
